executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex block from the process type doors_process
Add a new AGREE annex block to the process implementation doors_process.imp
In the implementation AGREE annex, add assume statements that express the same signal flow relationships using only visible identifiers from the process type

The new assume statements should be: assume "D1_handle_position routing": D1_handle_position => door1.handle_position; assume "D1_closed routing": D1_closed => door1.closed; assume "D2_handle_position routing": D2_handle_position => door2.handle_position; assume "D2_closed routing": D2_closed => door2.closed;
